name: codex-ilink-probe
description: Coordinates Codex Desktop and Codex iLink turns with a local atomic lease.

interface.shortDescription: Prevent conflicting Desktop and WeChat turns.
interface.longDescription: Sends privacy-limited lifecycle metadata to the local Codex iLink Bridge and uses a fail-closed SQLite lease only for the WeChat main task, the task currently entered from WeChat, and tasks with pending WeChat work. User-reviewed Desktop permission requests can stay online for an actionable WeChat decision; auto-reviewed requests remain silent. Prompts and transcripts are not copied by the plugin.
interface.defaultPrompt: Show the current Codex iLink Bridge and arbitration status.
